title: Text Kick Effect
result_description: You kick a line of text on the ground and it explodes toward the camera, filling the frame.

inputs.name: kick_clip
inputs.what_to_film: One take of you pretending to kick the text on the ground.

edit_steps.note: extend the text to the full length of the video

timing.cue: the exact frame the kick connects

edit_steps.note: resize & reposition the text onto the spot you kick
keyframe, scroll a few frames forward, then enlarge the text toward camera
tap Graph and choose Ease In to smooth the burst

result.description: Text launches toward the camera on the kick.
success_criteria: Text enlarges exactly on the kick contact
Ease-in makes the burst feel like an impact
Text legible at both small (ground) and large (full-frame) scale

narration_transcript: This is the text kick effect. You'll need only one recording of you pretending to kick the text. In the edit tab, tap text, type out your text and select your style. Extend the text to the length of the video and find the exact moment where your kick hits the text. Then resize and reposition the text to that spot. Add a keyframe, scroll a few frames forward and enlarge the text. You can ease the movement by tapping graph and selecting E's in. And that's it. Follow for more editing tips, tap export, and it should look like this.

source_meta.caption:
The Text Kick Effect 👟💥

That tiny text on the ground?

That’s your content right now…

Small. Ignored. Skipped.

Watch what happens when I kick it.

It explodes toward the camera and takes over everything.

That’s what your videos are missing—

a moment that forces attention.

No movement → no interruption

No interruption → no watch time

No watch time → no growth

Built in the Edits app using clean animated text, precise keyframes, and simple VFX…

but it completely changes how your content performs.

If you’re tired of posting and getting nothing back—this is the shift.

Follow for VFX that actually get you more views

Save this so your next edit hits harder

Share this with someone stuck spinning their wheels 🚀
